sentence: O tempo não está nada bom hoje.
ipa: u ˈtẽpu ˈnɐ̃w̃ eˈʃta ˈnadɐ ˈbõ ˈɔʒɨ
gloss_en: The weather is not good at all today.
notes: Unstressed reduction to [ɨ]/[ɐ] and nasal [ɐ̃w̃]/[õ] inherited from the EP base per mateus_dandrade2000; micaelense register per pwl_saomiguel.

sentence: Um quilo de fruta custa dois euros.
ipa: ˈũ ˈkiʎu dɨ ˈfɾytɐ ˈkyʃtɐ ˈdøʒ ˈewɾuʃ
gloss_en: A kilo of fruit costs two euros.
notes: Categorical stressed /u/ fronting to [y] in 'fruta'/'custa' per silva2008; intervocalic /l/ palatalised to [ʎ] in 'quilo' and [ø] for 'dois' per pwl_saomiguel.

sentence: A reunião é depois do almoço.
ipa: ɐ ʁewniˈɐ̃w̃ ˈɛ dɨˈpøʒ du ɐˈɫmɔsu
gloss_en: The meeting is after lunch.
notes: [ø] monophthong for 'depois' per silva2008; nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃], strong [ʁ] and dark coda [ɫ] in 'almoço' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: A minha família mora perto do mar.
ipa: ɐ ˈmiɲɐ fɐˈmiʎiɐ ˈmɔɾɐ ˈpɛɾtu du ˈmaɾ
gloss_en: My family lives near the sea.
notes: Palatal [ɲ] in 'minha' and intervocalic /l/ palatalised to [ʎ] in 'família' per pwl_saomiguel; open mid inherited per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Segue em frente e vira na segunda rua.
ipa: ˈsɨɡ ẽ ˈfɾẽt i ˈviɾɐ nɐ sɨˈɡũdɐ ˈʁyɐ
gloss_en: Keep straight ahead and turn on the second street.
notes: Stressed /u/ fronted to [y] in 'rua' (fronting applies even before a vowel here) per silva2008; 'segue em' liaison per mateus_dandrade2000; imperative register.

sentence: A sopa de peixe estava muito boa.
ipa: ɐ ˈsɔpɐ dɨ ˈpejʃ eˈʃtavɐ ˈmujtu ˈbɔɐ
gloss_en: The fish soup was very good.
notes: 'ei' kept in 'peixe' and coda [ʃ] per mateus_dandrade2000; open [ɔ] in 'sopa'/'boa' per segura2013.

sentence: Onde é que apanho o autocarro?
ipa: ˈõdɨ ˈɛ kɨ ɐˈpaɲu u awtuˈkaʁu
gloss_en: Where do I catch the bus?
notes: Palatal [ɲ] in 'apanho', strong [ʁ] in 'autocarro' and 'que apanho o' liaisons per mateus_dandrade2000; micaelense accent per pwl_saomiguel.

sentence: Quantas pessoas vêm ao jantar?
ipa: kwɐ̃ˈtɐʃ pɨˈs̺ɔɐʒ ˈvẽ aw ʒɐ̃ˈtaɾ
gloss_en: How many people are coming to dinner?
notes: Nasal [ɐ̃]/[ẽ] and coda [ʃ] in 'quantas'; interrogative per segura2013.

sentence: Se pudesse, comprava mais fruta no mercado.
ipa: sɨ puˈdɛs̺ɨ kõˈpɾavɐ ˈmajʃ ˈfɾytɐ nu mɨˈɾkadu
gloss_en: If I could, I would buy more fruit at the market.
notes: Categorical /u/ fronted to [y] in 'fruta' per silva2008; open [ɛ] in 'pudesse' and reduced pretonics per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Comprei uvas e queijo na feira.
ipa: kõˈpɾej ˈyvɐʒ i ˈkejʒu nɐ ˈfejɾɐ
gloss_en: I bought grapes and cheese at the market.
notes: Stressed /u/ fronted to [y] in 'uvas' per silva2008; 'ei' diphthongs in 'comprei'/'queijo'/'feira' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Naquela noite fomos de barco até à ilha.
ipa: nɐˈkɛlɐ ˈnøtɨ ˈfɔmuʒ dɨ ˈbaɾku ɐˈtɛ a ˈiʎɐ
gloss_en: That night we went by boat to the island.
notes: [ø] monophthong for 'noite' per silva2008; [ʎ] in 'ilha' and 'até à' liaison per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Telefona-me quando chegares a casa.
ipa: tɨlɨˈfɔnɐ mɨ ˈkwɐ̃du ʃɨˈɡaɾɨʒ ɐ ˈkazɐ
gloss_en: Call me when you get home.
notes: Nasal [ɐ̃] in 'quando', coda [ʃ] in 'chegares'; clitic imperative per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Boa tarde, então como tem passado?
ipa: ˈbɔɐ ˈtaɾd ẽˈtɐ̃w̃ ˈkɔmu ˈtẽ pɐˈs̺adu
gloss_en: Good afternoon, so how have you been?
notes: Nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'então' and [ẽ] in 'tem' per mateus_dandrade2000; greeting register per pwl_saomiguel.

sentence: Mais vale um pássaro na mão que dois a voar.
ipa: ˈmajʒ ˈvalɨ ˈũ ˈpas̺ɐɾu nɐ ˈmɐ̃w̃ kɨ ˈdøʒ ɐ vuˈaɾ
gloss_en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
notes: [ø] for 'dois', coda [ʃ] in 'mais' and nasal [ɐ̃w̃] in 'mão' per silva2008; proverb frame per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: O carro azul do meu primo é muito rápido.
ipa: u ˈkaʁu ɐˈzyɫ du ˈmew ˈpɾimu ˈɛ ˈmujtu ˈʁapidu
gloss_en: My cousin's blue car is very fast.
notes: Stressed /u/ fronted to [y] before a coda liquid in 'azul' ([ɐˈzyɫ]) per silva2008; strong [ʁ] in 'carro' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: De noite bebo pouco por causa da cruz.
ipa: dɨ ˈnøtɨ ˈbɛbu ˈpøku puɾ ˈkawzɐ dɐ ˈkɾyʃ
gloss_en: At night I drink little because of the cross.
notes: [ø] for 'noite'/'pouco' and /u/ fronted to [y] before a coda in 'cruz' ([kryʃ]) per silva2008; open [ɛ] in 'bebo'.

sentence: O sol brilha por cima do mar.
ipa: u ˈsɔɫ ˈbɾiʎɐ puɾ ˈsimɐ du ˈmaɾ
gloss_en: The sun shines over the sea.
notes: Velarised coda [ɫ] in 'sol', palatal [ʎ] in 'brilha' per mateus_dandrade2000; conservative back vowels per rogers1948.

sentence: O trabalho do meu filho é difícil.
ipa: u tɾɐˈbaʎu du ˈmew ˈfiʎu ˈɛ diˈfisiɫ
gloss_en: My son's job is difficult.
notes: Palatals [ʎ] in 'trabalho'/'filho' and dark coda [ɫ] in 'difícil' per mateus_dandrade2000; micaelense register per pwl_saomiguel.

sentence: O café está muito quente e forte.
ipa: u kɐˈfɛ eˈʃta ˈmujtu ˈkẽt i ˈfɔɾtɨ
gloss_en: The coffee is very hot and strong.
notes: Open [ɛ] in 'café'/'forte', nasal [ẽ] in 'quente' and coda [ʃ] per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: O número da tua porta é treze.
ipa: u ˈnymɨɾu dɐ ˈtyɐ ˈpɔɾtɐ ˈɛ ˈtɾɛzɨ
gloss_en: The number of your door is thirteen.
notes: Stressed /u/ fronted to [y] in 'número' and 'tua' per silva2008; open [ɔ]/[ɛ] in 'porta'/'treze' per mateus_dandrade2000.
